name: EHEC sensor (AI-3/QseC + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects enterohemorrhagic E. coli (EHEC) signalling via the AI-3 / host-adrenergic pathway. The QseC/QseB sensor gates a CRISPRi circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in the probiotic gut chassis E. coli Nissle 1917.

input.detects: The AI-3 inter-kingdom signal and host catecholamines that activate EHEC virulence
input.operatingRange: QseC responds across µM catecholamine / AI-3

sensing.sensorMechanism: The QseC sensor kinase detects AI-3/epinephrine and phosphorylates QseB, activating QseB-dependent promoters.
sensing.signalFlow: AI-3/epinephrine -> QseC/QseB activates its promoter -> transcribes an anti-reporter sgRNA -> CRISPRi inverts a constitutive reporter (NOT). Pair with a memory switch to record an EHEC-signalling episode in the gut.

parts.name: QseC/QseB two-component system
parts.notes: AI-3/catecholamine-responsive; native E. coli framework (works in Nissle).

parts.name: sfGFP reporter
parts.notes: Recoverable from stool for non-invasive readout.

output.result: Signal reports AI-3 / EHEC-type adrenergic signalling in the gut.

performance.notes: Detects a virulence-activating signal rather than the live pathogen; QseC/QseB and CRISPRi are validated separately and integration is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: Probiotic E. coli Nissle host; add thyA/dapA auxotrophy for gut-restricted containment.
safety.notes: Probiotic chassis with a human-safety record; research / supervised clinical use only.

buildSteps.title: Design sgRNA (+ optional memory)
buildSteps.description: Target the reporter promoter; optionally add a memory switch.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: QseC/QseB. TU2: target promoter -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9 + reporter. Low-copy vector.

buildSteps.title: Validate in vitro
buildSteps.description: Confirm AI-3/epinephrine response before any animal work.

buildSteps.title: Recover and measure
buildSteps.description: Recover cells from stool; quantify fluorescence.

provenance.source: Design template combining the QseC/QseB AI-3 adrenergic sensor with a dCas9 CRISPRi circuit in E. coli Nissle
partsSources: Sperandio et al. / QseC AI-3 inter-kingdom signalling (EHEC)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
